caption: The video features a man wearing a blue hat and glasses, who appears to be addressing an audience or participating in a public event. He is gesturing with his hands, possibly emphasizing a point during his speech. The setting seems to be outdoors, with green railings visible in the background, suggesting it might be a stadium or a similar venue. The text overlay on the screen indicates that this is a segment from "Plus Politics" on PlusTV Africa, with the headline "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu," suggesting that the man is discussing political matters related to Nigeria's needs and his role in addressing them. The website "www.plusvtafrica.com/live-tv" is also displayed, indicating where viewers can watch the broadcast online.
